title: Batch 1 — Contradiction to review primary case
baseline_summary: The baseline already routes the contradiction into review and avoids forced closure, but its coherent flow can still make the unresolved evidence look more settled than it is.
delta_summary_tail: captured why the coherent review path can still imply too much certainty.

comparison_axes.reason: Both tracks correctly keep the case in contradiction review.
Both tracks preserve the no-runtime and no-truth limits.
Delta more actively resists letting a coherent hold posture imply evidentiary closure.
Delta names the missing signals limiting confidence more explicitly.
Both tracks still support a bounded hold posture once the uncertainty stays visible.
